title: Ancient Proteins Extraction Protocol
author: Ashley Scott
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7vwhn7e

steps.title: Weigh samples (aim for 5-10 mg...
steps.instruction: Weigh samples (aim for 5-10 mg per sample) and place within a 1.5 mL Safelock Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Also prepare empty tubes for blank...
steps.instruction: Also prepare empty tubes for blank extractions that should be processed alongside your samples to monitor for lab contamination

steps.title: Add 500 µL of 0
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of 0.5 M EDTA to each sample, including extraction blanks.

steps.title: Close tubes tightly and set on...
steps.instruction: Close tubes tightly and set on a rotator until calculus becomes completely dissolved (invisible), or buoyant and feathery, typically between 2-5 days.

steps.title: Prepare solutions and label all tubes...
steps.instruction: Prepare solutions and label all tubes that will be needed for Day 1

steps.title: Spin down decalcified samples at 14,000 rcf for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Spin down decalcified samples at 14,000 rcf for 5 minutes

steps.title: Remove 300uL of EDTA supernatant and...
steps.instruction: Remove 300uL of EDTA supernatant and place in a new labeled sample and store in -20˚C freezer as backup.

steps.title: Add 50 µL of UA solution...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL of UA solution to a Microcon 30kDa filter unit. Avoiding the pellet, transfer the remaining 200 uL EDTA supernatant to the UA in the filter unit. Resuspend thoroughly to mix.

steps.title: Spin at 14,000 rcf at 18˚C for 15-18 minutes
steps.instruction: Spin at 14,000 rcf at 18˚C for 15-18 minutes.

steps.title: To the remaining pellet, add 30...
steps.instruction: To the remaining pellet, add 30 µL of SDS-lysis buffer and mix by resuspension. Incubate on heat block for 5 minutes at 95°C.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14,000 rcf at 18˚C for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14,000 rcf at 18˚C for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of UA solution...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of UA solution to the filter unit used in Step 7, followed by the pellet supernatant (~30 µL), avoiding any pellet debris, and resuspend to mix.

steps.title: Centrifuge filter unit at 14,000 rcf...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge filter unit at 14,000 rcf at 18˚C for 15-18 min until all liquid has passed through

steps.title: Discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through

steps.title: Add another 200 µL of UA...
steps.instruction: Add another 200 µL of UA solution to the filter unit

steps.title: Centrifuge filter unit at 14,000 rcf...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge filter unit at 14,000 rcf at 18˚C for 15-18 min until all liquid has passed through

steps.title: Place the remaining pellet tube in -20°C freezer for storage
steps.instruction: Place the remaining pellet tube in -20°C freezer for storage.

steps.title: Add 100 µL IAA solution (0
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL IAA solution (0.05 M) to the filter unit.

steps.title: Mix at 300 rpm in the...
steps.instruction: Mix at 300 rpm in the thermo-mixer for 1 min in the dark (cover with foil).

steps.title: Incubate for 15-20 min in the dark
steps.instruction: Incubate for 15-20 min in the dark

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14,000 rcf at 18˚C...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14,000 rcf at 18˚C for 12-15 min until all liquid has passed through.

steps.title: Discard flow-through in halogenated waste
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through in halogenated waste

steps.title: Add 200 µL of urea solution...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of urea solution to the Microcon unit and centrifuge at 14,000 rcf for 15-18 minutes.

steps.title: Repeat for a total of three washes of urea solution
steps.instruction: Repeat for a total of three washes of urea solution. Discard flow-through.

steps.title: Add 100 µL 0
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL 0.05M TEAB to the Microcon unit and centrifuge at 14,000 rcf for 12-15 minutes.

steps.title: Repeat twice for a total of...
steps.instruction: Repeat twice for a total of three washes of TEAB solution.

steps.title: Add 100uL of trypsin solution to each filter unit
steps.instruction: Add 100uL of trypsin solution to each filter unit

steps.title: Incubate overnight at 37C in the thermo-mixer at 300 rpm
steps.instruction: Incubate overnight at 37C in the thermo-mixer at 300 rpm

steps.title: Transfer the Spin Filter to a new labeled collection tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the Spin Filter to a new labeled collection tube.

steps.title: Add 40 µL of TEAB Solution
steps.instruction: Add 40 µL of TEAB Solution. Centrifuge the Spin Filter at 14,000 rcf for 10 min. DO NOT DISCARD FLOW-THROUGH.

steps.title: Repeat this step once
steps.instruction: Repeat this step once.

steps.title: Add 50 μL 0
steps.instruction: Add 50 μL 0.5 M Sodium Chloride Solution and centrifuge the Spin Filter at 14,000 rcf for 10 min.

steps.title: The filtrate contains digested proteins
steps.instruction: The filtrate contains digested proteins. Acidify the filtrate with TFA to a pH below 3 (approximately 18 μL of TFA will be needed).

steps.title: Desalt using method of choice (e
steps.instruction: Desalt using method of choice (e.g., StageTips or ZipTips).
